title: Automated API Documentation Generation
scenario: Generate API documentation for a RESTful API that includes endpoint descriptions, method types, request and response data structures, and example usage. The output should be well-structured markdown with proper formatting, using the OpenAPI specification.
constraints: Must use proper header formatting for each endpoint.
Must include a 'Summary' section for each endpoint.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the markdown is valid and properly formatted.
Verify that the output meets all specified constraints.
Check if the API documentation is accurate and complete.
